svg.title: Attestor Internal Machine Blueprint
svg.desc: One-picture dark blueprint of the Attestor internal machine. It shows main flow, ten decision axes, release PDP, admission PDP, enforcement PEP, customer gate, PROCEED/HOLD outcomes, boundaries, side loops, source modules, and repo-sourced value sets.
svg.text: One dark, readable source-of-truth map: flow + dimensions + value sets + matrices + boundaries + side loops.
All labels in the value panels are taken from current repo constants or directly from source unions; no unproven production claim is added.
output contract, target kind, artifact type
proof refs, evidence pack, trace evidence
classes: R0 / R1 / R2 / R3 / R4
Tenant perimeter: tenant/account/actor/request context stays bound across ingress, route lanes, candidate context, release, and admission.
Downstream contract boundary: PEP and customer gate are the last protected edge before real consequence.
Callers, Route Lanes, And Runtime Ingress
Public site and proof route group
Verification and filing routes enter the same candidate builder path.
Ten Decision Axes Applied To The Same Candidate
one fact set, projected into release and admission
time / identity / content / evidence / risk / scope / rollout / consequence / human / crypto
Enforcement PEP, Customer Gate, Terminal Outcomes
observed traffic -> action surface -> candidate -> review packet -> approved policy bundle only
terminal: accepted, denied, expired, revoked, overridden
Release Presentation Modes (6) And Enforcement Outcomes
Guard Activation Readiness Matrix (9 covered profiles x 11 criteria x 3 statuses)
Rows: guards. Columns: criteria 1-11. Status vocabulary: pass / blocked / not-applicable.
Data Minimization Audiences / Allowed Units / Governance Refs
Every listed surface is checked against every listed forbidden raw class; rawPayloadStored=false; raw override unsupported.
